note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). All scenarios drive the real core/actuate.Interceptor with an in-memory actuator + ledger.

scenarios.name: A mutating request is refused while mutation is off
An unwired interception chain fails loud and does not execute
A never-auto floor op is refused at the adapter even with mutation on
An ungated action is refused
An action_id mismatch is refused
An action with no bound evidence is refused
Mutation is enabled only through the proven wired gate
A fully-admissible governed actuation executes, verifies, and audits
A mutating action with no post-execution observer is refused before executing
A mispredicted post-state verifies as a deviation
An executed mutation records an execution_log bound to the action id
A breaker trip in one worker force-Shadows a sibling worker sharing the durable store
A policy approve verdict with a recorded human approval executes
A policy approve verdict with no recorded approval is refused
A policy deny verdict is refused even with a recorded human approval
The never-auto floor refuses an irreversible op even when approved and policy-auto
A single-host-bound effect leaf refuses an action targeting a different host
Cost accrues for each model completion into the daily and session accumulators
Exceeding the daily budget trips the cost breaker and force-Shadows
Exceeding a session ceiling trips the cost breaker and force-Shadows
A cost breaker trip force-Shadows a sibling worker sharing the durable store
A zero budget disables cost enforcement
An unreadable cost store fails open and does not halt operations
